testcase.name: test_multiplies_two_numbers_correctly
testcase.failure:
def test_multiplies_two_numbers_correctly(): > assert 3 * 4 == 99 E assert (3 * 4) == 99
test_math.py:5: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_does_not_divide_by_zero
testcase.failure:
def test_does_not_divide_by_zero(): > result = 1 / 0 ^^^^^ E ZeroDivisionError: division by zero
test_math.py:8: ZeroDivisionError
